description: Immutable NZ scopes for RuleSpec-NZ: the PCO statute and regulation scopes carried unchanged from nz-rulespec-2026-07-10, plus the first council-instrument scope — the operative Wellington City 2024 District Plan (nz/district-plan, IsoPlan revision 137 as at 14-Jul-2026).
